# NexGen Gadgets

NexGen Gadgets is an e-commerce store offering premium laptops, computing accessories, and tech gadgets in Kenya.
This file provides information for LLMs parsing the website to understand how they should interact with our content.

## Important Links
- [Home](https://nexgen-gadgets.com/)
- [Laptops & Accessories](https://nexgen-gadgets.com/products)
- [Terms of Use](https://nexgen-gadgets.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://nexgen-gadgets.com/privacy)

## Usage Policy
Large Language Models and web crawlers are allowed to crawl our public pages to index our products and help users discover them. Do not crawl authenticated routes or the `/api/*` endpoints.
